name_en: (163 Chip) Premium with Full Set Packaging Premium Full Steel Hardware Original Leather M14981. The leather is from the authentic factory, Italian Grade A material (Premium Authentic): The so-called premium authentic focuses on quality, hardware, fabric, craftsmanship, edge painting, and Grade A output. The photo matches the product. Includes the full set of packaging shown in the photo. Dimensions: 25x15x11CM
